# Sigil UI

> The component library where one token file updates everything. Built for agents.

## What is Sigil UI?

Sigil UI is a React component library built on a three-layer token system (primitive → semantic → component). Every component reads from CSS custom properties prefixed with `--r-`. Changing a single token value cascades to every component that references it.

## Packages

- `@sigil-ui/tokens` — Design tokens compiler. Exports CSS, Tailwind v4, and TypeScript.
- `@sigil-ui/components` — React components that consume `--r-*` CSS variables.

## Installation

```bash
pnpm add @sigil-ui/tokens @sigil-ui/components
```

## Component inventory

### Components
- **Button** — Polymorphic button with variants (primary, secondary, ghost, outline, destructive), sizes (sm, md, lg), asChild support via Radix Slot, loading state.
- **Card** — Composable card with CardHeader, CardBody, CardFooter slots. Variants: default, outlined, elevated, ghost. Interactive mode with hover elevation.
- **Input** — Styled text input with variants (outline, filled, flush), sizes, error state, prefix/suffix support.

### Layout
- **Stack** — Flex container for vertical/horizontal stacking. Configurable gap, alignment, justification. Polymorphic `as` prop.
- **SigilGrid** — CSS Grid with visible dot pattern at intersections. 2-6 columns. Includes SigilGridCell with hover highlight.

### Shapes
- **Diamond** — Rotated-square shape via CSS clip-path. Configurable size, color, variants (filled, outlined), animations (pulse, spin, float).
- **Hexagon** — Regular hexagon via CSS clip-path. Flat or pointy orientation. Variants: filled, outlined, gradient. Supports children for avatars/badges.

### 3D
- **Box3D** — CSS 3D box with six faces. GSAP-powered rotation. Variants: solid, wireframe, glass. Interactive cursor-follow and auto-rotate modes.
- **Card3D** — Perspective tilt card that follows cursor. GSAP spring physics. Glare effect, depth layers for parallax, configurable tilt intensity.

## Token categories

- **Colors** — OKLCH-based with light/dark mode. background, surface, primary, text, border, semantic (success/warning/error/info).
- **Typography** — font-display, font-body, font-mono.
- **Spacing** — 10-step scale from 4px to 96px.
- **Radius** — none through full (0px to 9999px).
- **Shadows** — sm through xl, multi-layer with transparency.
- **Motion** — Durations (instant to slower) and easings (default, in, out, in-out, spring).
- **Borders** — Width scale (none, thin, medium, thick).
- **Sigil** — grid-cell, cross-arm, cross-stroke, rail-gap, content-max, card-radius.

## Key differentiator

Unlike shadcn/ui where theming requires editing multiple files (tailwind.config.ts, CSS variables, individual component files), Sigil centralizes all design decisions in a single typed token object. One edit propagates everywhere.

## Documentation

Full docs at https://sigil-ui.dev/docs
